user.title: Connect to SpaBoii Add-On
user.description: Enter the host and port of the SpaBoii add-on. The host is typically the IP address of your Home Assistant machine.

zeroconf_confirm.title: SpaBoii Discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: SpaBoii was found at {host}:{port}. Click Submit to add it.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the SpaBoii add-on. Make sure it is installed and running.
